Init Containers:
  init-mysql:
    Container ID:  containerd://810646e9533e6792a6f7d7223b6f72ccdec9c19558d2b87df5e024531ee24f3d
    Image:         busybox:1.32
    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    State:          Terminated
      Reason:       Completed
      Exit Code:    0
      Started:      Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:16:39 +0800
      Finished:     Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:16:39 +0800
    Ready:          True
    Restart Count:  0
    Environment:    <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
      /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount from kube-api-access-9h4s7 (ro)

    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*

Name:               nacosdb-mysql
Namespace:          train-ticket
CreationTimestamp:  Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:16:35 +0800
Selector:           app=nacosdb-mysql,release=nacosdb
Labels:             app=nacosdb-mysql
                    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=Helm
                    chart=mysql-1.0.0
                    heritage=Helm
                    release=nacosdb
Annotations:        meta.helm.sh/release-name: nacosdb
                    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: train-ticket
Replicas:           3 desired | 3 total
Update Strategy:    RollingUpdate
  Partition:        0
Pods Status:        3 Running / 0 Waiting / 0 Succeeded / 0 Failed
Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=nacosdb-mysql
                    release=nacosdb
                    role=candidate
  Annotations:      checksum/config: b90c58b7645b67552901e093109469a55f3033e6fb12ecaf096606a107f0be2f
  Service Account:  nacosdb-mysql
  Init Containers:
   init-mysql:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
  Containers:
   mysql:
    Image:      radondb/percona:5.7.34
    Port:       3306/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m
      memory:  1Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      100m
      memory:   256Mi
    Liveness:   exec [sh -c mysqladmin ping -uroot] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c mysql -uroot -e "SELECT 1"] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      MYSQL_DATABASE:       nacos
      MYSQL_USER:           nacos
      MYSQL_PASSWORD:       <set to the key 'mysql-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
    Mounts:
      /etc/mysql/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /var/lib/mysql from data (rw)
      /var/log/mysql from logs (rw)
   xenon:
    Image:      radondb/xenon:1.1.5-helm
    Port:       8801/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     100m
      memory:  256Mi
    Requests:
      cpu:      50m
      memory:   128Mi
    Liveness:   exec [pgrep xenon] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c xenoncli xenon ping] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      POD_HOSTNAME:          (v1:metadata.name)
      HOST:                 $(POD_HOSTNAME).nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket
      LEADER_START_CMD:     /scripts/leader-start.sh
      LEADER_STOP_CMD:      /scripts/leader-stop.sh
      Master_SysVars:       sync_binlog=default;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=default
      Slave_SysVars:        sync_binlog=1000;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=1
    Mounts:
      /scripts from scripts (rw)
   slowlog:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      tail
      -f
      /logs/mysql-slow.log
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /logs from logs (rw)
  Volumes:
   conf:
    Type:       EmptyDir (a temporary directory that shares a pod's lifetime)
    Medium:     
    SizeLimit:  <unset>

    Type:       EmptyDir (a temporary directory that shares a pod's lifetime)
    Medium:

    Medium:     
    SizeLimit:  <unset>

    Name:          nacosdb-mysql

create-peers.sh:
----
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
i=0
while [ $i -lt 3 ]
do
  if [ $i = 0 ]
  then
    echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  else
    echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  fi
  i=$((i+1))
done


leader-start.sh:
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'


leader-stop.sh:
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'

application.yml:
----
# HTTP Server
server:
  port: 18888  # HTTP (Tomcat) port

spring:
  main:
    web-application-type: reactive
  application:
    name: ts-gateway-service
  cloud:
    nacos:
      discovery:
        server-addr: ${NACOS_ADDRS:127.0.0.1:8848}
    gateway:
      routes:
        - id: admin-basic-info
          uri: lb://${ADMIN_BASIC_INFO_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-basic-info-service}
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/v1/adminbasicservice/**

        - id: admin-order
          uri: lb://${ADMIN_ORDER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-order-service}
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/v1/adminorderservice/**

        - id: admin-route
          uri: lb://${ADMIN_ROUTE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-route-service}
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/v1/adminrouteservice/**

          predicates:
            - Path=/api/v1/admintravelservice/**

create-peers.sh:
----
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
i=0
while [ $i -lt 3 ]
do
  if [ $i = 0 ]
  then
    echo -n "tsdb-mysql-${i}.tsdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  else
    echo -n ",tsdb-mysql-${i}.tsdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  fi
  i=$((i+1))
done


leader-start.sh:
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'


leader-stop.sh:
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'


node.cnf:
----
[mysqld]
default_storage_engine=InnoDB
max_connections=65535


server-id.cnf:
----
[mysqld]
server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@

GetAppYAML:{\"app_name\":\"ts-assurance-:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-assurance-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-assurance-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-assurance-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-assurance-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-assurance-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18888
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 18888
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 18888
  selector:
    app: ts-assurance-service
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-mysql
type: Opaque
stringData:
  ASSURANCE_MYSQL_HOST: tsdb-mysql-leader
  ASSURANCE_MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
  ASSURANCE_MYSQL_DATABASE: ts
  ASSURANCE_MYSQL_USER: ts
  ASSURANCE_MYSQL_PASSWORD: Ts_123456

  name: ts-delivery-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-delivery-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-delivery-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-delivery-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-delivery-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-delivery-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: rabbitmq
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18808
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 18808
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---

    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=tsdb-mysql
                    release=tsdb
                    role=candidate
  Annotations:      checksum/config: dd4963089c3241784e09150ea66f874f878381782b9af9f81a95a7f10a08ba8f
  Service Account:  tsdb-mysql
  Init Containers:
   init-mysql:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
  Containers:
   mysql:
    Image:      radondb/percona:5.7.34
    Port:       3306/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m

  NACOS_ADDRS: nacos-0.nacos-headless.train-ticket.svc.cluster.local:8848,nacos-1.nacos-headless.train-ticket.svc.cluster.local:8848,nacos-2.nacos-headless.train-ticket.svc.cluster.local:8848
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: nacos
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: train-ticket
  creationTimestamp: "2026-03-08T07:21:10Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
  name: nacos
  namespace: train-ticket
  resourceVersion: "8896868"
  uid: be9b8ecc-674a-4a62-9c54-77b067362781

apiVersion: v1
data:
  create-peers.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eu
    i=0
    while [ $i -lt 3 ]
    do
      if [ $i = 0 ]
      then
        echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      else
        echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      fi
      i=$((i+1))
    done
  leader-start.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'
  leader-stop.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'
  node.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    default_storage_engine=InnoDB
    max_connections=65535
  server-id.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@

apiVersion: v1
data:
  application.yml: |-
    # HTTP Server
    server:
      port: 18888  # HTTP (Tomcat) port

    spring:
      main:
        web-application-type: reactive
      application:
        name: ts-gateway-service
      cloud:
        nacos:
          discovery:
            server-addr: ${NACOS_ADDRS:127.0.0.1:8848}
        gateway:
          routes:
            - id: admin-basic-info
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_BASIC_INFO_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-basic-info-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/adminbasicservice/**

            - id: admin-order
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_ORDER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-order-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/adminorderservice/**

            - id: admin-route
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_ROUTE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-route-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/adminrouteservice/**

            - id: admin-travel
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_TRAVEL_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-travel-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/admintravelservice/**

            - id: admin-user
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_USER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-user-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/adminuserservice/users/**

            - id: assurance
              uri: lb://${ASSURANCE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-assurance-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/assuranceservice/**

            - id: auth
              uri: lb://${AUTH_SERVICE_HOST:ts-auth-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/auth/**

            - id: auth-user
              uri: lb://${AUTH_SERVICE_HOST:ts-auth-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/users/**

            - id: avatar
              uri: http://${AVATAR_SERVICE_HOST:ts-avatar-service}:17001
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/avatar/**

            - id: basic
              uri: lb://${BASIC_SERVICE_HOST:ts-basic-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/basicservice/**

            - id: cancel
              uri: lb://${CANCEL_SERVICE_HOST:ts-cancel-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/cancelservice/**

            - id: config
              uri: lb://${CONFIG_SERVICE_HOST:ts-config-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/configservice/**

            - id: consign-price
              uri: lb://${CONSIGN_PRICE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-consign-price-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/consignpriceservice/**

            - id: consign
              uri: lb://${CONSIGN_SERVICE_HOST:ts-consign-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/consignservice/**

            - id: contacts
              uri: lb://${CONTACTS_SERVICE_HOST:ts-contacts-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/contactservice/**

            - id: execute
              uri: lb://${EXECUTE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-execute-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/executeservice/**

            - id: food
              uri: lb://${FOOD_SERVICE_HOST:ts-food-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/foodservice/**

            - id: inside-payment
              uri: lb://${INSIDE_PAYMENT_SERVICE_HOST:ts-inside-payment-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/inside_pay_service/**

            - id: notification
              uri: lb://${NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_HOST:ts-notification-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/notifyservice/**

            - id: order-other
              uri: lb://${ORDER_OTHER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-order-other-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/orderOtherService/**

            - id: order
              uri: lb://${ORDER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-order-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/orderservice/**

            - id: payment
              uri: lb://${PAYMENT_SERVICE_HOST:ts-payment-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/paymentservice/**

            - id: preserve-other
              uri: lb://${PRESERVE_OTHER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-preserve-other-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/preserveotherservice/**

            - id: preserve
              uri: lb://${PRESERVE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-preserve-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/preserveservice/**

            - id: price
              uri: lb://${PRICE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-price-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/priceservice/**

            - id: rebook
              uri: lb://${REBOOK_SERVICE_HOST:ts-rebook-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/rebookservice/**

            - id: route-plan
              uri: lb://${ROUTE_PLAN_SERVICE_HOST:ts-route-plan-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/routeplanservice/**

            - id: route
              uri: lb://${ROUTE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-route-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/routeservice/**

            - id: seat
              uri: lb://${SEAT_SERVICE_HOST:ts-seat-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/seatservice/**

            - id: security
              uri: lb://${SECURITY_SERVICE_HOST:ts-security-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/securityservice/**

            - id: station-food
              uri: lb://${STATION_FOOD_SERVICE_HOST:ts-station-food-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/stationfoodservice/**

            - id: station
              uri: lb://${STATION_SERVICE_HOST:ts-station-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/stationservice/**

            - id: train-food
              uri: lb://${TRAIN_FOOD_SERVICE_HOST:ts-train-food-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/trainfoodservice/**

            - id: train
              uri: lb://${TRAIN_SERVICE_HOST:ts-train-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/trainservice/**

            - id: travel2
              uri: lb://${TRAVEL2_SERVICE_HOST:ts-travel2-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/travel2service/**

            - id: travel-plan
              uri: lb://${TRAVEL_PLAN_SERVICE_HOST:ts-travel-plan-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/travelplanservice/**

            - id: travel
              uri: lb://${TRAVEL_SERVICE_HOST:ts-travel-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/travelservice/**

            - id: user
              uri: lb://${USER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-user-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/userservice/users/**

            - id: verification-code
              uri: lb://${VERIFICATION_CODE_SERVICE_HOST:ts-verification-code-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/verifycode/**

            - id: food-delivery
              uri: lb://${FOOD_DELIVERY_SERVICE_HOST:ts-food-delivery-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/fooddeliveryservice/**

            - id: wait-order
              uri: lb://${WAIT_ORDER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-wait-order-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/waitorderservice/**

    [mysqld]
    default_storage_engine=InnoDB
